creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next lunch out! 💚

@amazonicodubai is a rainforest-themed restaurant in DIFC. The menu highlights Nikkei cuisine; a delightful fusion of Peruvian-Japanese culinary traditions. 

Here are the things we love:
🦜 Lush setting that made us feel like we’re dining in  jungle 
🍽️ Great Business Lunch offer. We had the 4 course Menu Ejecutivo (155 AED). 3-course option is also available at 130 AED.

🕛 Monday to Friday, 12pm – 3pm.
📍DIFC Pavilion
